'''Bornaryn Trading''' was a company that was co-founded and co-owned by [[Bornan Thul]] and his wife, [[Aryn Dro Thul|Aryn]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After Bornan's death in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], Aryn become sole owner of the corporation, although Bornan's brother [[Tyko Thul|Tyko]] helped her to maintain the conglomerate's operations.

Prior to the [[Swarm War]], Bornaryn Trading purchased a controlling interest in the long-running [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing corporation of [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]], following the release of that company's [[R9-series astromech droid|R9-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. During that conflict, the growing company also acquired [[Xtib]], the [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]]-processing company that produced [[TibannaX]], the special isotope that was utilized in [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[StealthX]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] engines, which enabled the craft to conceal their ion tails. Among the holdings Bornaryn Trading acquired in their takeover of Industrial Automation was [[R2-0]], the prototype for the highly-successful [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] of astromech.
